title: infer passed

title: challenge started

payload.message: GPT-5.6 proposes inputs; only the host executes them

title: First model counterexample executed
detail: VIP · DAMAGED · 4500 cents → REPLACEMENT; inventory 10/0 → 9/1

counterexample.title: counterexample-vip-damaged-4500
counterexample.rationale: High: one crossed input directly resolves whether VIP tier or an amount below 12000 controls the decision while holding item condition, SKU, amount, and initial inventory to previously observed values.
counterexample.expectedDiscrimination: This crosses the previously observed VIP tier with the previously observed low amount. The tier-driven and amount-driven explanations imply different decisions for the same damaged return, directly separating them without introducing a new amount.

title: High-information counterexample executed
detail: STANDARD · DAMAGED · 50000 cents → MANUAL_REVIEW; inventory 10/0 → 10/0

counterexample.title: counterexample-standard-damaged-50000
counterexample.rationale: Very high: the fresh VIP-at-4500 trace supports tier priority over the proposed low-amount rule, leaving STANDARD at a substantially higher amount as the strongest unresolved cross-combination. A 50000-cent damaged return simultaneously probes the remaining tier-versus-amount conflict, the suspected high-value exception, and whether quarantine movement is deferred, without predicting the outcome.
counterexample.expectedDiscrimination: This combines the STANDARD tier with an amount materially above all automatically processed traces. It separates the remaining tier-driven explanation from the high-amount explanation while also exposing any unmodeled high-value priority exception; the resulting state and side effects can reveal whether inventory movement occurs immediately or is deferred.

title: Host narrowed the exact threshold
detail: 49999 cents processes automatically; 50000 cents enters review.

title: Host priority counterexample executed
detail: VIP · DAMAGED · 50000 cents → MANUAL_REVIEW; inventory 10/0 → 10/0

counterexample.title: Host-derived counterexample · priority at the boundary
counterexample.rationale: The host crosses customer tier at the exact review boundary to distinguish threshold priority from VIP replacement.

title: Contract rule · priority 1
detail: Within the observed damaged-return domain, the high-value boundary starts exactly at 50000 cents: 49999 cents follows the STANDARD refund branch, while 50000 cents follows MANUAL_REVIEW for both STANDARD and VIP. This rule runs before tier rules; at 50000 cents it leaves sellable and quarantine inventory unchanged and adds the return to the HIGH_VALUE review queue. Behavior above 50000 cents remains unknown.

hypothesis.statement: Within the observed damaged-return domain, the high-value boundary starts exactly at 50000 cents: 49999 cents follows the STANDARD refund branch, while 50000 cents follows MANUAL_REVIEW for both STANDARD and VIP. This rule runs before tier rules; at 50000 cents it leaves sellable and quarantine inventory unchanged and adds the return to the HIGH_VALUE review queue. Behavior above 50000 cents remains unknown.

title: Contract rule · priority 2
detail: After the 50000-cent review rule does not match, an observed VIP damaged return produces REPLACEMENT, decreases sellable inventory by one, increases quarantine by one, and creates a shipment. This is directly observed at 4500 and 12000 cents; other sub-50000 VIP amounts remain unobserved.

hypothesis.statement: After the 50000-cent review rule does not match, an observed VIP damaged return produces REPLACEMENT, decreases sellable inventory by one, increases quarantine by one, and creates a shipment. This is directly observed at 4500 and 12000 cents; other sub-50000 VIP amounts remain unobserved.

title: Contract rule · priority 3
detail: After the 50000-cent review rule does not match, an observed STANDARD damaged return produces REFUND for the full amount, leaves sellable inventory unchanged, increases quarantine by one, and records a refund ledger entry. This branch is observed from 4500 through the adjacent boundary probe at 49999 cents.

hypothesis.statement: After the 50000-cent review rule does not match, an observed STANDARD damaged return produces REFUND for the full amount, leaves sellable inventory unchanged, increases quarantine by one, and records a refund ledger entry. This branch is observed from 4500 through the adjacent boundary probe at 49999 cents.
